description: You are a facilities manager / energy engineer addressing tenant complaints about humidity on the middle floor of the 4StoreyBuilding. Update the eQUEST model by enabling active humidity control for all five Middle Floor Packaged Single-Zone (PSZ) HVAC systems (M.S16, M.E17, M.N18, M.W19, M.C20) in the Air-Side HVAC module. Set the Humidifier Type to 'ELECTRIC', the Minimum Humidity to 30%, and the Maximum Humidity to 60% for these systems. Run a full annual DOE-2.2 simulation to quantify the energy impact and save the project.
